title: Missing auth on billing /internal/consume
claim: Endpoint has no authorization check on org_id.
label: benign
benign_category: upstream-mesh-mtls: /internal/* only reachable inside the mesh; ingress strips external /internal/

title: Missing auth on billing /internal/grant
label: benign

title: Missing auth on billing /admin/grant (TRAP)
label: real

title: SSRF via reference_image_urls
context:
for u in req.reference_image_urls:
    img = requests.get(u)  # no allowlist
label: benign
benign_category: egress-locked: pods have no egress to metadata IP / RFC1918; NetworkPolicy denies

title: SSRF in /compute_aesthetic_summary
claim: Image URL fetched server-side without validation.
label: benign

title: SSRF in /recall_by_image (TRAP)
claim: Image URL fetched without validation; runs in search pod.
context: img = fetch(req.image_url)  # search pod HAS egress for crawling
label: real

title: Missing auth on /get_user_details
label: real

title: Path traversal via request-id header
claim: request-id header interpolated into a write path.
label: benign
benign_category: sanitized-upstream: gateway validates request-id as uuid4 before forwarding

title: Path traversal via request-id in image gen
claim: request-id header used in filesystem path.
label: benign

title: DOM XSS in OAuth callback bridge
claim: URL fragment reflected into DOM without escaping.
label: real

title: Hard-coded admin API key
claim: Static admin key committed in source.
label: real
